name: Review Card
description: A component for displaying summarized product reviews or comparative tables.

guidelines.purpose: Review Card summarizes product reviews, prices, and AI-generated insights. It can transform into a 3-column comparison table for side-by-side evaluations.

variants.standard: var(--size-card-width-lg) width, includes header, price, ratings, gallery, and AI summary box.
variants.comparison: rc--cmp modifier. Shows 2 columns in a bordered card with thumbnail, rating, attribute rows, and a full-width outline-tertiary action button.

anatomy.rating: rc__star-row with 5-star Amber stars and numeric score.
anatomy.ai_box: rc__ai-box (var(--color-background-secondary) bg). Contains AI gradient icon and var(--line-height-label-xsmall) summary text.
anatomy.shop_icons: Overlapping var(--sizing-500) circles representing available stores.
anatomy.gallery: 3-column photo grid, height var(--size-gallery-thumb-height) per image.
